---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- Two column hero -->
<div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:2.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; padding:2rem 0;">

<div style="flex-shrink:0; text-align:center;">

<img src="images/profile2.png" alt="Felipe Almeida"
     style="width:150px;
            height:150px;
            border-radius:50%;
            object-fit:cover;
            image-rendering: smooth;
            border:2px solid #050505;">

  <!-- Contatos abaixo da imagem -->
  <div style="margin-top:0.75rem; display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:0.8rem;">

  <!-- Email -->
  <a href="mailto:falmeida2@huskers.unl.edu" style="color:#050505;">
    <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v11/icons/maildotru.svg" width="20">
  </a>
  
  <!-- ORCID -->
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2112-0322"
   target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color:#050505;">
  <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v11/icons/orcid.svg" width="20">
</a>

  <!-- LinkedIn -->
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/felipe-miranda-de-souza-almeida-64522599"
     target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color:#050505;">
    <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v11/icons/linkedin.svg" width="20">
  </a>

  <!-- GitHub -->
  <a href="https://github.com/felipeeconomist"
     target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color:#050505;">
    <img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/simple-icons@v11/icons/github.svg" width="20">
  </a>

</div>

</div>

  <div style="flex:1; min-width:260px;">
    <h1 style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; color:#050505; margin-bottom:0.2rem;">Felipe Almeida</h1>
    <p style="font-size:1.05rem; color:#2C3E50; margin:0;">PhD Candidate, Agricultural Economics</p>
    <p style="font-size:1rem; color:#D00000; margin-top:0.1rem;">University of Nebraska–Lincoln</p>

    <p style="margin-top:1rem; line-height:1.8; color:#2C3E50;">
I am interested in research in agribusiness, examining both broader topics—such as labor market dynamics and GDP performance—and more specific issues related to crop and livestock production, with a focus on their economic and environmental dimensions. More recently, I have also focused on biofuels, analyzing their economic and environmental implications. In addition, I am currently working on a project on beef sustainability in Nebraska, with an emphasis on carbon intensity and other environmental footprints associated with feed inputs.
</p>

<div style="margin-top:1.2rem;">

  <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#6B7280; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
    Research Interests
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">

    <span style="background:#F3F4F6; color:#374151; padding:0.35rem 0.75rem;
                 border-radius:20px; font-size:0.85rem; border:1px solid #E5E7EB;">
      Agricultural, Livestock, and Environmental Economics
    </span>

    <span style="background:#F3F4F6; color:#374151; padding:0.35rem 0.75rem;
                 border-radius:20px; font-size:0.85rem; border:1px solid #E5E7EB;">
      Production Economics
    </span>

    <span style="background:#F3F4F6; color:#374151; padding:0.35rem 0.75rem;
                 border-radius:20px; font-size:0.85rem; border:1px solid #E5E7EB;">
      Agribusiness
    </span>

  </div>

</div>

    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:1.25rem;">
    <!--  <a href="research.html" style="background:white; color:#050505; padding:0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem; border:2px solid #050505;">Research</a> -->
      <a href="docs/cv.pdf" style="background:white; color:#050505; padding:0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem; border:2px solid #050505;">Download CV</a>

    </div>
  
  <!--
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:1rem;">
      <span style="background:#F3F0FA; color:#3D2B6B; padding:0.3rem 0.75rem; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; border:1px solid #9B8EC4;">Conservation Economics</span>
      <span style="background:#F3F0FA; color:#3D2B6B; padding:0.3rem 0.75rem; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; border:1px solid #9B8EC4;">Spatial Analysis</span>
      <span style="background:#F3F0FA; color:#3D2B6B; padding:0.3rem 0.75rem; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; border:1px solid #9B8EC4;">Dynamic Optimization</span>
      <span style="background:#F3F0FA; color:#3D2B6B; padding:0.3rem 0.75rem; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; border:1px solid #9B8EC4;">Agricultural Policy</span>
    </div>
    -->
    
  </div>
</div>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700; border-bottom:2px solid #050505; padding-bottom:0.4rem;">
Upcoming and Recent Events:
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:2.2;">

<strong style="color:#050505;">February 2026</strong> — UNL Center for Agricultural Profitability Webinar<br>
Topic: Estimating What Matters: Carbon Intensity in Corn and Soybean Markets
</p>

<strong style="color:#050505;">March 2026</strong> — UNL Center for Agricultural Profitability Webinar<br>
Topic: What’s the Carbon Footprint of Your Feed? New Evidence on Distillers’ Grains and Soybean Meal
</p>

<strong style="color:#050505;">June 2026</strong> — 2026 WAEA Annual Meeting, Flagstaff, Arizona<br>
Paper:
<ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 1rem 1.2rem;">
  <li><em>Economic and environmental trade-offs in Nebraska corn and soybean production</em></li>
</ul>

<strong style="color:#050505;">July 2026</strong> — 2026 AAEA Annual Meeting, Kansas City, Missouri<br>
Papers:
<ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 1rem 1.2rem;">
  <li><em>Eco-Efficiency and Economic–Environmental trade-offs in corn and soybean production in Nebraska (Lightning Session)</em></li>
  <li><em>Corn ethanol for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) in the United States: market and welfare effects (Poster)</em></li>
</ul>
</p>




<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700; border-bottom:2px solid #050505; padding-bottom:0.4rem;">Projects</h2>

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:1rem; margin-top:1rem;">
  
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF; border:1px solid #E5E7EB; border-top:3px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius:10px; padding:1.5rem; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
    <h3 style="color:#111827; font-size:1rem; margin-top:0;">
      Carbon Intensity (CI) of feedstuffs in Nebraska
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#6B7280; margin:0; line-height:1.6;">
      Work in progress (forthcoming).
    </p>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF; border:1px solid #E5E7EB; border-top:3px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius:10px; padding:1.5rem; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
    <h3 style="color:#111827; font-size:1rem; margin-top:0;">
      Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the Brazilian agribusiness sector
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#6B7280; margin:0; line-height:1.6;">
      Work in progress (forthcoming).
    </p>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF; border:1px solid #E5E7EB; border-top:3px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius:10px; padding:1.5rem; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
    <h3 style="color:#111827; font-size:1rem; margin-top:0;">
      Brazilian agribusiness labor market
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#6B7280; margin:0; line-height:1.6;">
     Work in progress (forthcoming).
    </p>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF; border:1px solid #E5E7EB; border-top:3px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius:10px; padding:1.5rem; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
    <h3 style="color:#111827; font-size:1rem; margin-top:0;">
      Producer Price Index for the agricultural sector in Brazil
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:#6B7280; margin:0; line-height:1.6;">
      Work in progress (forthcoming).
    </p>
  </div>

</div>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">


<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<script>
  lucide.createIcons();
</script>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
